involvement_detail: Primary suspect identified from CCTV footage near MG Road metro. Matches description of chain snatcher.
Identified as the motorcycle rider (getaway driver) from CCTV. Known associate of Ravi Kumar.
Phone number used in phishing SMS traced to SIM registered under his alias. Prior cybercrime history.
Fingerprints matched at the crime scene. Known for jewelry store robberies across south Karnataka.
Arrested at the apartment with 5kg cannabis. Confessed to running distribution in Bengaluru, Mysuru, and Mangaluru.
Eyewitness identified suspect as the attacker. Matches description of known rowdy sheeter in area.
Primary accused. Found with blood-stained knife matching victim's wounds. Known history of personal disputes escalating to violence.
Informant tip suggests involvement as lookout during the Mysuru jewelry robbery. Under investigation.
